_comment_v6: Fixed backwards ASB1/HZBO1 mults (were 0.0 in bull_trend — primary bull strategies!). Enabled breakout. Raised ATT1 bull mult. Better VWAP range allocation. All-market coverage: bull strategies active in bull, bear strategies in bear, range strategies in all.
_comment_v7: Registered 5 new sleeves to fill long/short coverage gaps. breakdown_v2: improved SHORT (1h structure, faster than v1). slope_choch: SHORT at sloped resistance change-of-character (pairs with sloped LONG). liq_cascade: bidirectional panic/squeeze fade (all regimes, Bybit-unique). funding_rev: bidirectional funding-rate reversion (Bybit 8h funding edge). micro_scalp: bidirectional EMA pullback scalper (both sides, all regimes, increases trade count). Market coverage matrix now: BULL longs ×7, BEAR shorts ×4, RANGE both ×7, FUNDING edge ×1.

sleeves.name: breakout
sleeves._comment: Long-side breakout on momentum. Primary bull strategy. Off in bear_trend.

sleeves.name: breakdown
sleeves._comment: Short-side breakdown. Primary bear strategy. Reduced in bull regimes.

sleeves.name: flat
sleeves._comment: Range fade at resistance. Best in chop/neutral, works in all regimes.

sleeves.name: sloped
sleeves._comment: Sloped channel both-side trades. Active in all regimes.

sleeves.name: att1
sleeves._comment: Trendline touch — works in all regimes, highest in bull_trend. Proven live positive.

sleeves.name: asm1
sleeves._comment: Sloped momentum. Bull-biased but works in bear_trend on pullbacks.

sleeves.name: midterm
sleeves._comment: BTC/ETH midterm pullback longs. Full in bull, halved in bear.

sleeves.name: midterm_short
sleeves._comment: REJECTED. v1 failed WF-22: only 2-TF hierarchy, no MACD/RSI daily filter, too many false signals in choppy bear. Replaced by midterm_short_v2 sleeve. Set to 0.0 permanently.

sleeves.name: midterm_short_v2
sleeves._comment: RESEARCH-ONLY. 3-TF hierarchy: weekly→daily→4h. 0/22 WF on current data — REJECTED until market conditions improve for shorts. Requires re-test after 6+ new windows.

sleeves.name: range_scalp
sleeves._comment: Range scalp — best in chop, active in all regimes.

sleeves.name: asb1
sleeves._comment: FIXED v6: support bounce/slope break — LONG strategy, primary in BULL. Was erroneously 0.0 in bull_trend (backwards). Now: max in bull_trend, off in bear_trend.

sleeves.name: hzbo1
sleeves._comment: FIXED v6: horizontal breakout — can do BOTH longs and shorts. Was 0.0 in bull_trend (wrong). Now: active in all regimes, direction set by orchestrator ALLOW_LONGS/ALLOW_SHORTS.

sleeves.name: bounce1
sleeves._comment: Support bounce longs — bull-only. Off in bear regimes.

sleeves.name: impulse
sleeves._comment: Impulse volume breakout longs — bull-only momentum.

sleeves.name: pump_fade
sleeves._comment: Fade pumps — works in all markets. Slightly reduced in bull_trend.

sleeves.name: elder_ts
sleeves._comment: REJECTED. v2 failed hard 2024 PF=0.853 DD=62%, 2023 PF=0.715 DD=83%. Root causes: no daily macro gate, hist_sign=False, consec_bars=1. Stays 0.0 permanently. Use elder_ts_v3 sleeve instead after WF-22.

sleeves.name: elder_ts_v3
sleeves._comment: RESEARCH-ONLY. Full rewrite: Screen0 daily EMA50/200, hist_sign=True, consec_bars=3, ATR quality gate, FI+RSI dual Screen2, 50% body Screen3. 0 trades on last annual — over-constrained. Needs parameter relaxation + WF-22 PF>1.20 DD<25% before enabling.

sleeves.name: vwap_mr
sleeves._comment: VWAP mean reversion — best in chop, active in all regimes. Raised bull_trend from 0.3 to 0.6.

sleeves.name: breakdown_v2
sleeves._comment: v7 NEW. Improved SHORT breakdown — uses 1h structure (vs 4h in v1), 2× faster signal. RSI<50 filter + volume confirmation. Pairs with breakout (bull LONG). Run alongside breakdown v1 initially, then promote to replace if WF-22 shows better PF.

sleeves.name: slope_choch
sleeves._comment: v7 NEW. SHORT at sloped-resistance change-of-character (CHOCH). Bears break a recent swing-low below a sloped resistance zone. Counterpart to sloped (LONG channel bounces). Activated in bear regimes; conservative in bull.

sleeves.name: liq_cascade
sleeves._comment: v7 NEW. Bidirectional liquidation-cascade fade. LONG after long-liquidation panic dip; SHORT after short-squeeze spike (LC_ALLOW_SHORTS=1). Bybit perpetuals unique edge — liquidation engines create mechanical overshoot. Works in ALL regimes. Slightly reduced in calm chop. Pairs with impulse (chases breakouts, liq_cascade fades the exhaustion).

sleeves.name: funding_rev
sleeves._comment: v7 NEW. Bybit 8h funding-rate mean reversion. Positive extreme → SHORT (longs overpaying, market exhausted). Negative extreme → LONG (shorts overpaying, snapback likely). Requires funding_rate_fetcher.py cron injecting live rates. Works in ANY regime — edge is structural, not directional. Slight reduction in strong trends (trend can overwhelm reversion).

sleeves.name: micro_scalp
sleeves._comment: v7 NEW. 5m EMA pullback scalper. 15m EMA20 slope sets direction (long/short/flat), enters on 5m pullback to EMA9 zone with momentum reclaim candle. Session-gated: 07:00–17:00 UTC (London+NY). Bidirectional — direct counterpart to every trend sleeve. Expected 400–600 trades/year on 8-symbol universe, dramatically improving statistical significance. Conservative mults to start — raise after WF-22.
